relationships: kab:Ad iliɣ da arma d letnayen i d-iteddun

kab:Cukkeɣ yewwi-d ad neddukel d tarbaɛt
kab:Tura ad nẓeṛ d acu ara yeḍṛun
kab:Tom yella iḥemmel ad yexdem d Mary
kab:Akka tura deg Marikan, d ass
kab:Tom d Mary ad xedmen deg iḍ-a﹖
kab:Iban Tom ue yettuɣal ara ad yexdem ayagiseg wass-a d asawen
kab:Ur yeẓri ara Tom dakken Mary d Takanadit
kab:Nnan-as i Tom d akken ur ilaq ara ad iṛuḥ
kab:Marie ur teẓri ara dakken d nettat ay yettwasmemmin
kab:Ula d mary ur tezmir ara ad tṛuḥ ɣer Boston
kab:Ur yezmir ara Tom ad immeslay d Mary
kab:Acuɣer ur d-tesbeddayeḍ ara iman-im d taselwayt﹖
kab:Yetturar ddabex n uḍar d yimeddukal-is
kab:Acuɣer ur d-tesbeddayeḍ ara iman-ik d aselway﹖
kab:Tom ur yettɣimi ara, d acu kan Mary ad teqqim
kab:Marie tella d tamburt s teɣzef n tmeddurt-nnes
kab:Ini-yas i Tom d akken ur zmireɣ ara ad zewǧeɣ yid-s
kab:Acuɣer ur nettraǧu ara armi d ass n letnayen﹖

kab:Mary tenna-d dakken yella ccek d ameqran ad terbeḥ

kab:Mary tenna-d dakken ur telli ara d tamesɣarut
kab:Ulac win yeẓran d akken Tom mačči d Akanadi

kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tḥuss i yiman-is d tuṛhift
kab:Akka ttwaliɣ d acu yellan ur igerrez ara
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tḥuss i yiman-is d taɣudant
kab:Ulac d acu iteddun di tmurt-nneɣ
kab:Tom yella iḥemmel ad yemmeslay d Mary
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tḥuss i yiman-is d tameɛfunt
kab:Tom yella yettmenni dakken d Mary ara irebḥen
kab:Ula d Tom ur yelli ara yettmeslay tafṛansit
kab:Tom ur yessin ula d yiwen seg yimeddukal n Mary
kab:Yenna-d Tom d akken ur yumin ara s wayenni
kab:Ayɣer ur tɣetsem ara s yiman-nwen ayen yellan d uɣdim﹖
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad txedmeḍ d yiwen ma ulac lemqadra gar-awen
kab:Yella ccek d ameqqran ur tetteddu ara ad teg afooting yid-s
kab:Yenna-d Tom d akken Mary ilaq ad tṛuḥ
kab:Dacu-t wemgarad yellan ger Badminton d Tennis ﹖
kab:Amdan yellan d uksin ur yezmir ad yamen aya
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad amneɣ d akken Tom yexdem ayen-nni
kab:Yal yiwen yessaram d akken kra n dir ur d-iḍerru
kab:Tom imir-nni kan i yeẓra d akken amjebbad yella-d seg sin n yidisan
kab:Ur tezmiremt ara ad as-tinimt i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Tom d Mary d iselmaden deg sin tura
kab:Yella ccek d ameqqran dakken mačči d nettat i ixedmen axeddim-nni
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tom yella d amsehyuf
kab:Yenna-d Tom d akken Mary ur texliɛ ara aṭas
kab:Ula d nekk bɣiɣ ad mmeslayeɣ akked Tom
kab:Ur iɣil ara Tom d akken zemreɣ ad xedmeɣ aya
kab:Tom d Mary mmeslayen ɣef tegnewt n wass-a
kab:Tom iḥemmel ad yurar tennis, ma d Mary ala
kab:Tom atan di Boston, ma d Mary ulac-itt
kab:Ula d yiwen seg yinelmaden-nni ur d-yewwiḍ deg lawan
kab:Seg wakken meqqer armi ay yezmer ad yili d jeddi-s
kab:Ulamek ara nesεu lḥeqq nekk d Tom deg sin
kab:Yella d acu i zemreɣ ad t-xedmeɣ i wakken ad tent-ɛiwneɣ﹖
kab:Yenna-d Tom d akken ur yettmeslay ala i kečč
kab:Yenna-d Tom d akken ur yettmeslay ala i kenwi
kab:Ismideg n Isṛayil akken ma yella d uday
kab:Tom ur as-yenni ara i Mary d acu i yella yeḥwaǧ
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad as-tiniḍ i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Aqcic-nni i la yettmeslayen akked Mary, d Tom
kab:Ur tezmirem ara ad as-tinim i Tom d acu ara yexdem
kab:Tom d Mary ɣur-sen kra imdukal di Canada
